sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Manlang in kong paikik ding hi.
Mi siangtho te hong pi ding in.
Thu um misi te thoto ding,
Kham innpi sungah va bang in leng to ding.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Va bang in kei ka leng ding hi.
Nisuah nitum sak leh khang pan,
Thu um mite ki kaikhawm ding,
Kham innpi ah vabang in leng to ding.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Thu um mite tawh ki mu ding, (Halleujah)4
Lungdam kipak in Pasian phat den ding .

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kham innpi ah kei ka tung ding,
Topa’n khitui hong nul sak ding .
Nat na satna te om nawn lo. (Hallelujah)4
Lungdam kipak in Pasian phat den ding.
